page_content:
BSST389 Internship in Terrorism Studies (1-6 Credits)

Supplements student's experiential learning experience, or internship in the field of terrorism studies and homeland security, with guided reflection on their experiences.

Restriction: Must have earned a minimum cumulative GPA of 2.5. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

BSST398 Individual Study in Terrorism Studies II (1-3 Credits) An independent study course for START Students. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
